topic: What happens in your body when you skip breakfast (real science)
caption:
Think skipping breakfast is a shortcut to weight loss or better health? 🤔 Science says otherwise, and the effects on your body are surprisingly complex. From spiking cortisol to muscle breakdown, missing that morning meal can set your day—and your metabolism—on the wrong track. 📉 Your body isn't just 'waiting' for lunch; it's actively reacting to the absence of fuel. We’re talking about shifts in insulin sensitivity, cognitive function, and even long-term weight management. Don't let myths mislead you! 💡 Understanding these mechanisms is key to optimizing your health from the moment you wake up. What's your go-to healthy breakfast? Share in the comments! 👇

💾 Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who thinks skipping breakfast is a good idea. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — fuel your body right from the start! ✨
